test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/parsing/test_dataloader.py b/test/units/parsing/test_dataloader.py
index 188d149e40..2cda421978 100644
--- a/test/units/parsing/test_dataloader.py
+++ b/test/units/parsing/test_dataloader.py
@@ -230,3 +230,41 @@ class TestDataLoaderWithVault(unittest.TestCase):
         with patch('builtins.open', mock_open(read_data=vaulted_data.encode('utf-8'))):
             output = self._loader.load_from_file('dummy_vault.txt')
             self.assertEqual(output, dict(foo='bar'))
+
+    def test_cache_parameter_default(self):
+        """Validates the cache parameter default value, type annotation, and caching behavior."""
+        import inspect
+
+        sig = inspect.signature(self._loader.load_from_file)
+        param = sig.parameters['cache']
+        self.assertEqual(param.default, 'all',
+                         "load_from_file cache default must be 'all'")
+        self.assertIn(param.annotation, (str, 'str'),
+                      "load_from_file cache annotation must be str")
+
+        mock_data = (b'{"key": "value"}', True)
+        with patch.object(type(self._loader), '_get_file_contents', return_value=mock_data):
+            plain_path = '/tmp/test_default_plain.yml'
+            self._loader._FILE_CACHE.pop(plain_path, None)
+            self._loader.load_from_file(plain_path)
+            self.assertIn(plain_path, self._loader._FILE_CACHE,
+                          "Default cache value must cause file to be cached")
+
+    def test_selective_cache_criteria(self):
+        """Validates the caching criteria for cache='selective' mode."""
+        plain_path = '/tmp/test_selective_plain.yml'
+        self._loader._FILE_CACHE.pop(plain_path, None)
+        mock_data_plain = (b'{"plain_key": "plain_value"}', True)
+        with patch.object(type(self._loader), '_get_file_contents', return_value=mock_data_plain):
+            result = self._loader.load_from_file(plain_path, cache='selective')
+        self.assertEqual(result, {"plain_key": "plain_value"})
+        self.assertNotIn(plain_path, self._loader._FILE_CACHE,
+                         "cache='selective' must NOT cache files with show_content=True")
+
+        vault_path = '/tmp/test_selective_encrypted.yml'
+        self._loader._FILE_CACHE.pop(vault_path, None)
+        mock_data_vault = (b'{"secret_key": "secret_value"}', False)
+        with patch.object(type(self._loader), '_get_file_contents', return_value=mock_data_vault):
+            result = self._loader.load_from_file(vault_path, cache='selective')
+        self.assertIn(vault_path, self._loader._FILE_CACHE,
+                      "cache='selective' must cache files with show_content=False")
diff --git a/test/units/plugins/vars/test_host_group_vars.py b/test/units/plugins/vars/test_host_group_vars.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..ea8be73968
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test/units/plugins/vars/test_host_group_vars.py
@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
+
+
+class TestCallSiteCacheModes(unittest.TestCase):
+
+    def test_call_site_cache_modes(self):
+        """Validates that inventory, host_group_vars, and play vars_files each
+        pass the correct cache mode to load_from_file."""
+
+        # --- Inventory: yaml.py ---
+        from ansible.plugins.inventory.yaml import InventoryModule as YamlInventoryModule
+
+        loader = MagicMock()
+        loader.load_from_file.return_value = {'all': {'hosts': {'test1': None}}}
+        inventory = MagicMock()
+
+        yaml_plugin = YamlInventoryModule()
+        with patch.object(yaml_plugin, 'set_options'):
+            try:
+                yaml_plugin.parse(inventory, loader, '/tmp/test.yaml')
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+
+        loader.load_from_file.assert_called()
+        inv_call = loader.load_from_file.call_args
+        inv_cache = inv_call.kwargs.get(
+            'cache', inv_call.args[1] if len(inv_call.args) > 1 else None
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(inv_cache, 'none',
+                         "yaml.py InventoryModule must call load_from_file with cache='none'")
+
+        # --- Inventory: auto.py ---
+        from ansible.plugins.inventory.auto import InventoryModule as AutoInventoryModule
+
+        auto_loader = MagicMock()
+        auto_loader.load_from_file.return_value = {'plugin': 'test_plugin'}
+        auto_plugin = AutoInventoryModule()
+        try:
+            auto_plugin.parse(inventory, auto_loader, '/tmp/test.auto')
+        except Exception:
+            pass
+
+        auto_loader.load_from_file.assert_called()
+        auto_call = auto_loader.load_from_file.call_args
+        auto_cache = auto_call.kwargs.get(
+            'cache', auto_call.args[1] if len(auto_call.args) > 1 else None
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(auto_cache, 'none',
+                         "auto.py InventoryModule must call load_from_file with cache='none'")
+
+        # --- Inventory: __init__.py BaseInventoryPlugin._read_config_data ---
+        from ansible.plugins.inventory import BaseInventoryPlugin
+
+        base_loader = MagicMock()
+        base_loader.load_from_file.return_value = {'plugin': 'test'}
+        base_plugin = BaseInventoryPlugin()
+        base_plugin.loader = base_loader
+        base_plugin.NAME = 'test'
+        base_plugin._redirected_names = ['test']
+        try:
+            base_plugin._read_config_data('/tmp/test.config')
+        except Exception:
+            pass
+
+        base_loader.load_from_file.assert_called()
+        base_call = base_loader.load_from_file.call_args
+        base_cache = base_call.kwargs.get(
+            'cache', base_call.args[1] if len(base_call.args) > 1 else None
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(base_cache, 'none',
+                         "BaseInventoryPlugin._read_config_data must call load_from_file with cache='none'")
+
+        # --- host_group_vars ---
+        from ansible.plugins.vars.host_group_vars import VarsModule
+
+        vars_plugin = VarsModule()
+        mock_loader = MagicMock()
+        mock_loader.load_from_file.return_value = {"host_var": "value"}
+        vars_plugin.load_found_files(mock_loader, {}, ['/tmp/host_vars/host1.yml'])
+
+        hgv_call = mock_loader.load_from_file.call_args
+        hgv_cache = hgv_call.kwargs.get(
+            'cache', hgv_call.args[1] if len(hgv_call.args) > 1 else None
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(hgv_cache, 'all',
+                         "host_group_vars must call load_from_file with cache='all'")
+
+        # --- play vars_files in VariableManager ---
+        from ansible.vars.manager import VariableManager
+
+        vm_loader = MagicMock()
+        vm_loader.path_dwim_relative_stack.return_value = '/tmp/vars/main.yml'
+        vm_loader.load_from_file.return_value = [{"play_var": "val"}]
+
+        mock_inventory = MagicMock()
+        vm = VariableManager(loader=vm_loader, inventory=mock_inventory)
+
+        mock_play = MagicMock()
+        mock_play.get_search_path.return_value = ['/tmp']
+        mock_play.get_vars.return_value = {}
+        mock_play.get_roles.return_value = []
+        mock_play.get_vars_files.return_value = [['vars/main.yml']]
+
+        try:
+            vm.get_vars(play=mock_play)
+        except Exception:
+            pass
+
+        vm_loader.load_from_file.assert_called()
+        vm_call = vm_loader.load_from_file.call_args
+        vm_cache = vm_call.kwargs.get(
+            'cache', vm_call.args[1] if len(vm_call.args) > 1 else None
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(vm_cache, 'selective',
+                         "play vars_files must call load_from_file with cache='selective'")
